name: bookwright-local
description: Local marketplace for the Javne politike book tooling.

plugins.name: bookwright
plugins.description: Per-chapter and status tooling for the Javne politike Quarto book. A book-conductor that tracks chapter status and routes work into self vs co-author piles, book-style (enforces STYLE.md), book-enrich (applies ENRICHMENT.md), book-review (a five-critic chapter panel), and the five critics they dispatch.
